title: SAENA contracts registry (v1)
description: Machine-validated schema for packages/contracts/registry.json — the single-owner (Contracts Steward, ADR-0011) index of all versioned contract artifacts under packages/contracts/{json-schema,openapi,asyncapi}. One entry per contract major-version directory.
$comment: Relational constraints NOT expressible in JSON Schema are enforced by tests/contract/validate/test_registry.py (W1 harness), not this schema — cohort-below-threshold precedent (packages/observability/registry/attributes.schema.json). Enforced there: (1) name+major uniqueness across contracts[]; (2) full_version's major-version prefix (X in X.Y.Z) equals the entry's major field; (3) $id path 1:1-maps to the on-disk file (ADR-0011 $id scheme); (4) category matches the $id path's category segment.

registry_version.description: Registry document schema version (not a contract version). Bump requires an ADR per ADR-0011 layout stability constraint.

contracts.description: One entry per contract major-version directory. Empty until each schema unit lands its entry in the same commit as the schema file (ADR-0011 §Current decision, atomicity constraint).

name.description: Contract slug, kebab-case, matches the file's directory name segment in packages/contracts/{json-schema,openapi,asyncapi}/<category>/<name>/.

catalog_name.description: Back-reference to the conceptual contract row in docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md (12 contracts). Distinct from name/file identity: e.g. the RunContext catalog row splits into two registry entries/files (run-context-lifecycle, run-context-experiment) that both carry catalog_name "RunContext" (ruling R10, ADR-0011 §RunContext split precedent).

category.description: Contract category — matches the {category} path segment in both the on-disk layout and $id (ADR-0011 $id scheme).

compat_class.description: Compatibility policy class (ADR-0012, ruling R6): closed = additionalProperties:false, all changes major (signed contracts and most domain/context contracts); open = event-payload style progressive evolution (optional-add = minor); frozen = envelope, any change requires a new ADR. Distinct from signed — compat_class governs schema evolution rules, signed governs human-signature semantics; a contract can be closed without being signed.

signed.description: True only for contracts representing a human signature artifact (ChangePlan, ApprovalDecision — ruling R6). All other contracts, including other closed-class contracts, are false. Not a compatibility class — see compat_class.

major.description: Major version — matches the v{major} path segment (directory-per-major layout, ADR-0011).

full_version.description: Full semver of the current release for this major line, e.g. "1.3.0". Corresponding git tag: contracts/{name}/v{full_version} (ADR-0011).

$id.description: Canonical non-resolvable identifier (ADR-0011), 1:1 with the on-disk file path. .schema.json for json-schema contracts; .yaml for openapi/asyncapi documents.

owner.description: Single owner role slug (ADR-0011 single-owner principle), e.g. "contracts-steward".

status.description: Entry lifecycle: draft (schema authored, pre-tag) -> active (at first/subsequent release tag) -> deprecated (superseded major, post-tag).

frozen_authority_adr.description: ADR that authorizes this frozen contract's current field set (e.g. ADR-0013 for envelope). Required whenever compat_class is frozen (ADR-0012 envelope-frozen policy); absent otherwise.
